notes:
v0.1.4: Engine Stabilization & Smart Playback Update
- CRITICAL: Fixed engine initialization crash ('Poison Error') on some systems
- Smart Resume: Play/Spacebar now automatically resumes your last track and position
- Seamless Streaming: Safer background prefetching for gapless playback
- Right-Click to Play: Quick mouse-driven playback trigger on the player canvas
- Proportional UI Scaling: Controls now scale perfectly to any window size
- Detailed Error Reporting: Transparent feedback for failed updates
- Localized History: Multi-language support for the in-app Changelog
